## Before You Continue

Do not report active vulnerabilities in a public issue. Follow `SECURITY.md` for private vulnerability disclosure.

Use this template only for non-sensitive hardening proposals.

## Summary

Describe the proposed hardening improvement.

## Area

- [ ] Authentication/JWT
- [ ] Authorization/RLS
- [ ] Document upload/storage
- [ ] Dependency security
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Logging/PII handling
- [ ] CORS/rate limiting
- [ ] Deployment/secrets
- [ ] Documentation

## Risk Reduced

What risk does this reduce?

## Proposed Change

Describe the change and any migration or compatibility concerns.

## Validation

How should maintainers verify the improvement?
